# fastly_product_enablement_ddos_protection (Resource)

Enables DDoS Protection on a service. Product Enablement operates on the service directly rather than a specific service version, so this resource is not tied to a `version` and applies immediately.



## Schema

### Required

- `mode` (String) Operation mode. Can be `off`, `log`, or `block`.
- `service_id` (String) The ID of the service to enable DDoS Protection on. Changing this value will delete and recreate this resource against the new service.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource (identical to `service_id`).
